message:
test(wave-22): add 22 unit tests for util/arena, cli/completion

Cover ArenaIndex Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/Ord/Hash, Arena Default/with_capacity/
get_mut/contains/iter/drain_values, Shell Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/parse aliases,
CompletionItem builder, and PowerShell/Elvish completion generation.
